articles.author: Dorothy_Li

summary: Today’s Azure blogs focused on developer productivity and operational control across Azure Functions and Azure SQL tooling in VS Code. The biggest announcement was new partial failure handling for Azure Functions Service Bus triggers, giving teams finer-grained control over how individual messages are completed, abandoned, or dead-lettered instead of failing an entire batch; meanwhile, Azure SQL Dev Corner highlighted easier SQL development workflows in Visual Studio Code with configurable SQL code analysis rules that don’t require editing the project file, plus improved schema management through a Publish dialog and reusable item templates.
